mapper.select: SELECT s.*, (SELECT content FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = s.id ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1) as last_message, (SELECT create_time FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = s.id ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1) as last_message_time FROM chat_session s WHERE s.id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT s.*, (SELECT content FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = s.id ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1) as last_message, (SELECT create_time FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = s.id ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1) as last_message_time, m.unread_count FROM chat_session s INNER JOIN chat_session_member m ON s.id = m.session_id WHERE m.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM chat_session WHERE type = 'PROJECT' AND related_id = #{projectId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM chat_session WHERE type = 'TEAM' AND related_id = #{teamId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session(type, related_id, name, avatar) VALUES(#{type}, #{relatedId}, #{name}, #{avatar})
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_session SET name = #{name}, avatar = #{avatar} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE chat_session SET update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
